title: MECO's Better Outlined Ores
description: MECO's Better Outlined Ores creates visible outlines for every vanilla ore variant to make mining and spotting ores easier.
body: MECO's Better Outlined Ores creates visible outlines for every vanilla ore variant to make mining and spottings ores easier. It adds a unique colored outline for each ore variant to make each ore more easily distinguishable from others.
